commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: resolve nginx conf.d path from Digital Twin YAML, not DATA_DIR (#41)

Export/import used config.templateSettings.DATA_DIR to guess the conf.d
path, which doesn't match the actual deployed path. Now parses the
hostPath volumes from the Digital Twin's stored YAML — same approach
the backup system uses (single source of truth).

Extracted shared findNginxConfDir() into src/lib/nginx/confDir.ts.

commit.message:
feat: Telegram bot interface — access Steward via Telegram

New interface: steward/interfaces/telegram.py
- Owner-only auth (TELEGRAM_OWNER_ID) — full LLM + tools
- Non-owners get polite rejection (no LLM cost)
- Commands: /start, /reset, /status
- Auto-chunking for messages > 4096 chars
- Serialized access (asyncio.Lock — one task at a time)
- Session persistence (save/load conversation)
- All safety guards active (Narasimha, Iron Dome)

Entry points:
  steward --telegram
  steward-telegram
  python -m steward.interfaces.telegram

Environment:
  TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN (from @BotFather)
  TELEGRAM_OWNER_ID (from @userinfobot)

Optional dependency: pip install steward[telegram]
425 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: hlasové ovládání CHJ – STT + TTS + intent routing

Pipeline: Mic button → SpeechRecognition → /api/voice → AI parsuje → akce + TTS

/api/voice.js (nový endpoint):
- Rychlá lokální detekce SHOW_NODE (bez AI, keyword mapping)
- AI parsing pro LOG_ACTIVITY, LOG_BIOMETRIC, START_TIMER, CHAT
- Ukládá data do user_fitness_tests / user_biometrics

universe-voice.js (rozšířen):
- listenOnce() – Web Speech API SpeechRecognition, vrátí Promise<string>
- handleVoiceInput(text) – intent routing → showPanel / timer / log / TTS
- startVoiceTimer(secs, label) – overlay timer s odpočtem
- proactiveGreeting() – CHJ promluví po prvním stisku (1x denně, dle stavu baterie)
- aiSpeakWhenReady() – počká na načtení hlasů v Chrome

universe-init.js:
- initVoiceButton() – mic tlačítko; první stisk = pozdrav, další = poslouchám
- Import listenOnce, handleVoiceInput, proactiveGreeting

index.html:
- Floating mic button #voice-mic-btn (bottom-right, 56px)
- Pulsující animace při poslechu, modrá při přemýšlení

commit.message:
Add LP debounce, component gallery, error retry, useCanvas, prop docs, CI, useSearch, useTags

Feature #1: Live Preview debounce
- Only rebuild decorations when doc changes or cursor crosses a JSX block
- Cursor movement within non-JSX areas no longer triggers rebuilds

Feature #2: Component gallery command
- "Show component gallery" generates a note listing all registered
  components with props parsed from @prop comments and destructuring

Feature #3: Better error recovery
- ErrorBoundary retry increments a key, forcing React to re-create
  the child tree from scratch (not just reset error state)

Feature #4: useCanvas hook
- useCanvas(drawFn, deps) returns a ref for <canvas> elements
- Clears and redraws on dependency changes

Feature #5: Component prop docs
- parsePropsFromSource reads // @prop comments and const {} = props
- Gallery command uses this to show prop tables

Feature #6: GitHub Actions CI
- .github/workflows/ci.yml runs tsc, tests, build on push/PR
- Checks bundle size (warns if >1 MB)

Feature #7: useSearch hook
- useSearch(query, maxResults) does full-text vault search
- Returns {results: [{path, name, matches}], loading}

Feature #8: useTags hook
- useTags(filterTag?) returns all tags with counts
- Filters files by tag when filterTag is provided

62 tests, 14 example pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Discovery: numeric_code vs integer_number leading-zero signal

Document finding that pure-digit columns without leading zeros get
stuck as numeric_code (VARCHAR) when CharCNN is highly confident,
because header hints can't override same-domain 100% predictions.
Proposed F4 rule using existing has_leading_zero feature signal.

commit.message:
Replace cell-based hover with plant-proximity detection and snap labels to hovered plant

Hover now raycasts terrain to find the world hit point, then searches a 3x3
neighborhood for the closest plant within its visual footprint radius. Removes
the 5x5 neighborhood averaging. Species labels snap directly to the hovered
plant position instead of lerping from the territory centroid.

commit.message:
feat: v1.0.10 — SessionStart hook + NudgingStrategy

SessionStart hook:
- ClaudeCodeAgent._write_startup_hook() writes a type:"command" curl hook
  (SessionStart only supports command hooks, not http) in .claude/settings.local.json
- POST /agents/{id}/ready endpoint sets asyncio.Event; no auth required so the
  hook can call it without needing the API key
- _wait_for_ready() awaits the event (60s timeout) instead of polling pane output

NudgingStrategy:
- Stop hook fires POST /agents/{id}/task-complete; orchestrator sends a nudge
  via notify_stdin instead of completing the task when stop_hook_active is set
- Explicit /task-complete (no stop_hook_active) completes the task

Two-phase orchestrator startup (web mode):
- _defer_agent_start=True: _start_background_tasks() creates dispatch loops first
- start_agents() fires as background task AFTER lifespan yields (server up)
- Prevents SessionStart hook deadlock (agents can POST /ready once server accepts connections)
- TUI/test mode: sequential start preserved for backward compatibility

Demo: 15/15 checks passed — both agents reached IDLE in 2.0s via hook,
pipeline task completed with explicit /task-complete signalling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add graph-aware retrieval design proposal and roadmap update (#73)

* docs: design proposal for graph-aware retrieval (depth traversal + connectivity salience)

Two enhancements to leverage existing relation data during search:
1. --depth N parameter on recall to traverse relations from top results
2. Connectivity term in salience scoring based on incoming relations

Motivated by vector DB vs Graph RAG trade-off analysis — VecLayer already
stores the graph, these proposals make it active during retrieval.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code - Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EnnttgPkBMQoFyPZqfyowL

Reference design doc for depth traversal and connectivity salience.

commit.message:
Build complete M-Crypto platform: Django backend + React Native mobile app

Backend (Django 5 + DRF):
- Phone+PIN+OTP auth with bcrypt, Google OAuth, JWT tokens
- Multi-currency wallets (USDT/BTC/ETH/SOL/KES) with double-entry ledger
- Payment saga pattern with 3-layer idempotency prevention
- M-Pesa Daraja API client (STK Push, B2B, B2C, Reversal) with RSA SecurityCredential
- Rate engine: CoinGecko + forex composition with 30s rate locking
- KYC tiered daily limits, device fingerprinting, progressive PIN lockout
- M-Pesa IP whitelist middleware, health check endpoint
- Admin dashboard with transaction management and CSV export
- Production settings: Sentry, WhiteNoise, JSON logging, DB pooling
- Docker Compose with PostgreSQL 16, Redis 7, Celery workers
- 35+ tests covering auth, wallets, saga, idempotency, rates

Mobile (React Native + Expo):
- Dark theme fintech design (teal primary, amber accent)
- 4-tab navigation: Home, Pay, Wallet, Profile
- Complete payment flow: PayBill/Till → Rate Lock → PIN Confirm → Success
- Auth flow: Phone → OTP → Name → PIN (register) / Phone → PIN (login)
- Balance card, rate ticker, transaction history, deposit modal
- Error boundary, network status, loading screen, biometric auth
- NativeWind (Tailwind), TanStack Query, expo-router, expo-secure-store
- EAS Build profiles for dev/preview/production

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: always-visible copy/edit/delete buttons in History; gram-based food editing

History: remove hover/long-press reveal — edit, copy, delete buttons are now
always visible inline, consistent with MealCard behaviour.

EditMealDialog: replace the unitless × multiplier with a gram input.
Parses the original gram value from food.quantity (e.g. "200g", "~118g"),
shows it as an editable field with a "g" suffix. Scale is computed as
newGrams / originalGrams. Inputs with no parseable gram info are shown
disabled (macros stay unchanged). Labels updated to reflect grams.
